reference: Method: hippocampal z-score (residualized for age, sex, TIV) per BrainChart (Bethlehem et al., Nature 2022) and Potvin et al. 2016 normative subcortical modelling. Coefficients here are an UNCALIBRATED placeholder, NOT fit on a same-pipeline cohort.
